data.title: Bitcoin mining company MARA joins MIT Media Lab
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Bitcoin mining company MARA announced that it has joined the Massachusetts Institute of Technology MIT Media Lab. The two parties will explore how digital energy technologies can support energy systems. MARA will monetize excess energy and balance the power grid with flexible electricity demand, exploring new ways to advance energy systems using digital energy technologies such as Bitcoin mining.

data.title: Today, the US ETF Bitcoin ETF has a net outflow of 2,368 BTC, and the Ethereum ETF has a net inflow of 6,589 ETH
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Lookonchain monitoring, today 10 US ETF Bitcoin ETFs had a net outflow of 2,368 BTC, of ​​which ARK 21Shares had an outflow of 998 BTC. Currently, ARK 21Shares holds 45,616 BTC, worth US$4.78 billion; 9 Ethereum ETFs had a net inflow of 6,589 ETH, of which BlackRock had an inflow of 13,480 ETH. Currently, BlackRock holds 1,506,775 ETH, worth US$3.8 billion.

data.title: Cork Protocol updates hacker incident progress: will redeploy the market to enable LP withdrawals
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that Cork Protocol officially updated the progress of the hacker attack, revealing that Cork Protocol suffered a vulnerability attack at 11:39 UTC time on May 28, resulting in 3,761 wstETH being stolen from the wstETH:weETH market. The next step will be to redeploy the market to enable LP withdrawals and actively recover the stolen funds, while integrating key learnings to strengthen and improve Cork's protocol security and resilience.

data.title: Deutsche Bank Explores Stablecoins and Tokenized Deposits
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Deutsche Bank is currently investigating the potential of stablecoins and tokenized deposits. This move reflects the bank's interest in digital currency innovations and its potential applications in the financial sector. The exploration into these digital assets aligns with a broader trend among financial institutions seeking to integrate blockchain technology into their operations.

Analysts predict a drop in BTC price to at least $103K, while traders awaits Friday’s nonfarm payrolls data and crypto options expiry. Meanwhile, Wall Street activity navigate a complex mix of macroeconomic concerns, institutional inflows, and seasonal patterns
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/06/06/bitcoin-ethereum-slip-below-max-pain-price-crypto-market-crash-ahead/

data.title: Gavin Wood: I personally do not plan to issue new tokens based on the JAM protocol
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Polkadot founder Gavin Wood responded to whether to issue JAM Token in the Polkadot forum. He said: I personally do not plan to issue new tokens based on the JAM protocol, nor do I think it is wise for Parity and Web3 Foundation to issue such tokens. Of course, the leadership of these organizations can decide for themselves. I usually oppose those actions that I think cannot bring actual net benefits to Polkadot, but I do continue to explore ideas that may bring long-term value to Polkadot, sometimes involving new tokens, but these tokens usually form a symbiotic relationship with DOT, rather than replacing it.

data.title: Metaplanet Sets Sights on 100K Bitcoin With $5.3B Equity Raise
data.description:
Metaplanet, Japan’s pioneering corporate Bitcoin adopter, announced a bold plan to acquire 91,112 BTC by the end of 2026—raising its target to 100,000 BTC.

The post Metaplanet Sets Sights on 100K Bitcoin With $5. 3B Equity Raise first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/06/06/metaplanet-plans-5-32b-equity-raise/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=metaplanet-plans-5-32b-equity-raise

data.title: The U.S. SEC released the agenda and guest details for the June 9 crypto roundtable
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) announced the agenda and guest details of the June 9 crypto roundtable. The theme of this meeting is "DeFi and the American Spirit". U.S. SEC Chairman Paul S. Atkins, Commissioner Caroline A. Crenshaw, Mark T. Uyeda, and Hester M. Peirce attended. Participants included Espresso Systems co-founder Jill Gunter, Columbia Business School adjunct professor Omid Malekan, Arktouros pllc co-founder Michael Mosier, Jito Labs Chief Legal Officer Rebecca Rettig, etc.

data.title: Stablecoins' Impact on Global Payment Networks and U.S. Treasury Holdings
data.description:
According to Odaily, a16z Crypto has published an article titled 'Stablecoins: A 1+ Billion-User Onboarding Opportunity,' highlighting the significant growth of stablecoins over the past year. The transaction volume of stablecoins has reached $33 trillion, marking a historic high and surpassing PayPal's transaction volume by 20 times and Visa's by three times. Stablecoins have become integrated into the vast global payment networks that have existed for decades.

The rise of stablecoins has resulted in $128 billion of U.S. Treasury bonds being held by stablecoin entities, placing them among the top 20 holders of U.S. Treasury bonds, surpassing countries like Saudi Arabia, South Korea, the UAE, and Germany. Citibank recently predicted that by 2030, stablecoin holdings in U.S. Treasury bonds could reach $3.7 trillion, making them the largest holders on this list.

Stablecoins have long faced criticism for being used primarily for settling speculative cryptocurrency trades. However, recent data suggests that their usage extends beyond this, indicating a broader integration into financial systems.
